name: The other Dad
description:
Artist: https://x.com/BlazinAhegao?t=xD81RQ51dNXUAotoicW8Bw&s=09

Basically your Child is a Bully, You can decide how you raised him. But the Premise is that His Son is being Picked on and he is Coming to the Source. How will you handle it?

Tell me how I may improve. Also sorry for the time it took, I'll try to make a few more Bot's this week.
creator: DeAngelo
